content:
I would like NeuroNation MED (Synaptikon GmbH) to keep me informed about new insights, short summaries of relevant studies and information about its features. I hereby agree to receive personalized newsletters from NeuroNation MED. I can revoke this consent at any time via the app settings or via email.

Tailored ideas and inspiration for your activities

We work to help you stay fit and mentally sharp and develop the best training for your needs. To achieve this, we collaborate with scientists and clinicians from all over the world and publish our results in emails and other forms of media. Also, we share news on NeuroNation MED. Our team sets high standards in the selection of content and aims for positive training results.

NeuroNation MED (Synaptikon GmbH) uses the following personal data for communication with you:

- Contact details
- Language

In our privacy policy you will find further information about the data contact at NeuroNation MED, as well as the purpose and scope of collection and processing of personal data.
